positive: A beautiful, storybook illustration featuring three friendly fae creatures (pixies, sprites, and dryads) gathering wildflowers in a misty meadow. Watercolor and ink style, ethereal glow, soft focus, muted jewel tones, Art Nouveau influence, gentle and magical.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh edges, cyberpunk, graffiti, aggressive, modern grit
